palma_ibiza.name: Palma -> Ibiza

current_validation.suitability: no route-specific SOCIB current observation configured

palma_ibiza.route_note: Exposed SW Mallorca to Ibiza crossing; watch the Ibiza Channel when NW swell builds.

palma_barcelona.name: Palma -> Barcelona

validation.suitability: forecast-only mainland transit lane until a trusted validation source is added

current_validation.suitability: no route-specific SOCIB current observation configured

palma_barcelona.route_note: Mainland transit lane to Barcelona; forecast coverage is available, while validation will be added later when a trusted observation source is chosen.

palma_cabrera.name: Palma -> Cabrera

validation.suitability: closest public SOCIB wave buoy to Palma departure waters

current_validation.suitability: no route-specific SOCIB current observation configured

palma_cabrera.route_note: Shorter exposed run south of Mallorca; comfort depends on wave direction and shelter near Cabrera.

palma_valencia.name: Palma -> Valencia

validation.suitability: forecast-only mainland transit lane until a trusted validation source is added

current_validation.suitability: no route-specific SOCIB current observation configured

palma_valencia.route_note: Mainland transit lane to Valencia; forecast coverage is available, while validation will be added later when a trusted observation source is chosen. Until the data domain is widened further west, the far-west end of the lane is only approximate.

ibiza_formentera.name: Ibiza -> Formentera

validation.suitability: closest public SOCIB wave buoy for Ibiza/Formentera channel context

current_validation.suitability: no route-specific SOCIB current observation configured

ibiza_formentera.route_note: Short channel route; current and local chop can matter even when wave height looks modest.

alcudia_ciutadella.name: Alcudia -> Ciutadella

validation.suitability: no suitable SOCIB wave buoy in the Menorca Channel via DataDiscovery

current_validation.suitability: Ciutadella station current observations for Menorca Channel endpoint context

alcudia_ciutadella.route_note: Menorca Channel crossing; exposed conditions can restrict smaller vessels sooner than other routes.

palma_ciutadella.name: Palma -> Ciutadella

validation.suitability: Menorca Channel arrival context using Ciutadella currents and coastal exposure

current_validation.suitability: Ciutadella current observations for Menorca Channel arrival context

palma_ciutadella.route_note: Palma to Ciutadella crossing; keep an eye on the northwest edge of Mallorca and the Menorca Channel approach.

palma_mahon.name: Palma -> Mahon

validation.suitability: Menorca east-coast arrival context using Mahon observations

current_validation.suitability: Mahon observation context for the eastern Menorca approach

palma_mahon.route_note: Longer Palma to Mahon crossing; east Menorca approach is more exposed and should be checked with a fresh forecast window.
